mapper.select: /* HanjinDlvryWblSbmCnfrmMapper.selectHanjinDlvryWblSbmCnfrmTgtList 한진택배 접수 확인 대상 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY ,OH.OWKEY ,OH.OBHDKEY ,OH.WBLNO ,OH.WAHDKEY ,SBM.COLCTREQDAY ,SBM.EDICD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_HANJIN_SBM SBM ON OH.CTKEY = SBM.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = SBM.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = SBM.OBHDKEY AND OH.WBLNO = SBM.WBLNO WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.DLVRYCORPCD = #{dlvryCorpCd} /*택배사코드*/ AND OH.DLVRYPRGRSTATUSCD = '20' /*접수중*/ ORDER BY OH.OBHDKEY, OH.WBLNO

/* HanjinDlvryWblSbmCnfrmMapper.selectWaveWorkStatusByOutboundHeaderDeliveryStatus 한진택배 운송장접수 확인 대상 조회 */ SELECT WH.CTKEY ,WH.OWKEY , WH.WAHDKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN OH.DLVRYPRGRSTATUSCD = '99' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN '15' WHEN COUNT(OH.OBHDKEY) = SUM(CASE WHEN OH.DLVRYPRGRSTATUSCD = '30' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN '20' ELSE WH.WAWKSTATUSCD END AS WAWKSTATUSCD FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON WH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND WH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND WH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON WD.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND WD.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND WD.OBHDKEY = OH.OBHDKEY WHERE WD.CTKEY = #{CTKEY} AND WD.OWKEY = #{OWKEY} AND WD.WAHDKEY = #{WAHDKEY} AND WD.DELYN = 'N' AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD IN ('11', '15') GROUP BY WH.CTKEY, WH.OWKEY, WH.WAHDKEY, WH.WAWKSTATUSCD
